narrative: U.S. equities finished a choppy week slightly lower for large caps as investors rotated beneath the surface: semiconductors extended an AI-driven surge while financials were pressured by policy headlines (including discussion of a one-year 10% cap on credit-card interest rates) even amid generally solid bank earnings. Small caps outperformed, with the Russell 2000 up about 2% on the week as leadership broadened beyond mega-cap growth into more cyclically sensitive areas and “cheaper” parts of the market.

value_picks.name: Old National Bancorp
value_picks.why_undervalued: Trading at significant discount to estimated fair value based on cash flows amid sector pressures.
value_picks.bull_case: Solid Q1 2026 earnings with strong NIM and loan growth signal recovery potential as rates stabilize.

value_picks.name: Huntington Bancshares
value_picks.why_undervalued: Near 52-week lows with reasonable multiples despite robust balance sheet and acquisitions.
value_picks.bull_case: Recent acquisitions like Cadence enhance scale; Q1 profitability supports dividend and buybacks.

value_picks.name: TowneBank
value_picks.why_undervalued: Deep discount to cash flow fair value in regional banking downturn.
value_picks.bull_case: Stable deposit growth and conservative lending position it for rate cut benefits.

value_picks.name: Seven Hills Realty Trust
value_picks.why_undervalued: REIT trading below NAV with strong liquidity and low leverage.
value_picks.bull_case: Loan book expansion and facility extensions provide growth runway.

value_picks.name: Motorcar Parts of America
value_picks.why_undervalued: Cyclical auto parts name at trough multiples post supply chain issues.
value_picks.bull_case: Improving revenue outlook as industry stabilizes.

momentum_picks.name: Super Micro Computer
momentum_picks.catalyst: AI server demand surge and strong earnings beat driving momentum into Q1.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: High volatility but leader in AI infra offers asymmetric upside.

momentum_picks.name: Astera Labs
momentum_picks.catalyst: Semiconductor connectivity for AI data centers gaining traction.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Early stage growth stock with solid insider ownership.

momentum_picks.name: Credo Technology
momentum_picks.catalyst: High-speed connectivity solutions benefiting from AI boom.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Strong growth forecasts outweigh competition risks.

momentum_picks.name: Bitdeer Technologies
momentum_picks.catalyst: Crypto mining efficiency gains amid bitcoin rally.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Crypto exposure adds volatility but high earnings growth potential.

momentum_picks.name: Sandisk Corporation
momentum_picks.catalyst: Memory chip recovery and AI storage demand.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Cyclical but positioned for multi-year upcycle.

watchlist_updates.detail: TSMC reported outstanding earnings and announced US capex increase to $52-56B by 2026.
Goldman Sachs Q4 EPS $14.01 vs est $11.77.
Morgan Stanley Q4 EPS $2.68 vs est $2.41.
TSMC co-CEO Mark Liu bought $7.8M shares.
PNC beat expectations and increased buyback.
GE Vernova up on gas turbine benefits from power plant expansion.
Hit yearly low $295.42 close $296 on Jan 16.
